summary.lv: Zabbix SIA meklē Tehniskā Mārketinga Inženieri (Product Ambassador), kurš definēs tehniskā mārketinga stratēģiju, pārstāvēs produktu webināros un pasākumos, veidojot tehnisko saturu un apmācot mārketinga un klientu komandas.
summary.en: Zabbix SIA is looking for a Technical Marketing Engineer (Product Ambassador) to define their technical marketing strategy, represent the product at webinars and events, and create technical content while bridging engineering and marketing teams.
